title: Generate all Parentheses II
hints: Use backtracking to generate all valid parentheses combinations.
Keep track of the number of open and close parentheses used.
You can add '(' if the count of open parentheses is less than A.
You can add ')' if the count of close parentheses is less than open parentheses.
When both counts reach A, you have a valid combination - add it to the result.
After each recursive call, backtrack by removing the last added character.
